name: Gulyasleves
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion and red bell pepper.
2. Brown the chopped vegetables in the lard over high heat until they are golden brown, about 5 minutes.
3. Add paprika powder, diced beef, salt, pepper, caraway seeds, and bay leaf to the pan. Stir well.
4. Pour in 6 cups of hot water and bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer for 1 hour.
6. Add the peeled diced potatoes and cook until they are tender.
7. (Optional) For CSIPETKE: Beat an egg in a bowl, add 3 tablespoons of flour, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and 3 tablespoons of oil (no water). Mix to form a firm dough.
8. Pinch the dough into pea-size pieces and drop them into the simmering soup.
9. Before serving, sprinkle chopped parsley over the stew.
